creator: nuzrin@nuzrin.com
text:
Upgrade zope from 2.4.2 to 2.4.3

Fix: [root@xiao-feng /usr/ports/www]# diff -ruN zope zope-new
PORTNAME=      zope
-PORTVERSION=   2.4.2
+PORTVERSION=   2.4.3
 PORTREVISION=  0
 CATEGORIES=    www python zope
 MASTER_SITES=  http://www.zope.org/Products/Zope/${PORTVERSION}/
How-To-Repeat: None
